productDisplayName: Deni Yo Men Blue Slim Fit Jeans
description: Style NoteButton up these exceedingly stylish jeans from deni yo this season for the ubercool look. Designed with a washed grey effect, these jeans will bring some variety to your casual clothes collection. Mix it up with a graphic tee for a trendy look.Product DetailsBlue jeans with a washed look, has two insert pockets in the front, two back pockets with embroidery, insert coin pocket on the right front, comfortable waistband with belt loops, brand patch on the waistband at the back and metal button and zipper closure on the frontMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash in cold waterDo not tumble dryUse warm ironSize and FitSlim fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size M
